summary: Critical issues: (1) Test fixtures referenced in 20 tests are not provided—tests cannot run (e.g., fixtures/basic_matrix.json, fixtures/include_matrix.json). (2) Task explicitly requires 'ALL TESTS MUST RUN THROUGH ACT'—no tests execute the workflow via act; all 20 tests are direct script invocations, violating the core requirement. (3) Test 11 expects 'False' (Python repr) but JSON outputs lowercase 'false'. (4) Weak assertions: many tests use string matching (`[[ output == *'value'* ]]`) instead of rigorous JSON parsing; only tests 10, 11, 12, 19, 20 parse JSON properly. (5) Missing edge cases: no tests for complex matrices (3+ dimensions), config JSON parse errors, include/exclude interaction, empty arrays, type coercion. (6) Workflow tests (15–18) only verify file existence and lint, not execution. Test suite structure is clear but fundamentally incomplete—fixture data is absent, workflow integration is missing, and critical task requirements are unmet.
